hero.title: Clinic Management
hero.subtitle: Simplified and Secure
hero.description: MediCore is your all-in-one platform for managing your medical clinic. Patient management, appointments, medical records and payments in one place.

errors.signatureRequired: Please sign in the box above
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

confirmation.acceptTerms: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service.
confirmation.termsContent:
Terms of Service

  1. Acceptance of Terms: By registering, you agree to abide by all terms and conditions set forth below.
  2. Confidentiality: Your medical and personal data are treated with the utmost confidentiality, in accordance with applicable laws (GDPR, etc.).
  3. Usage License: Access to the platform is subject to an annual/monthly license.
  4. Medical Liability: The platform is merely a management tool; full responsibility for medical acts remains with the practitioner.
  5. Cancellation: You may cancel your registration with 30 days notice, subject to conditions.

Please read the full document available at the dedicated URL.
